description: A goods-received / invoice-received clearing entry, the accounting backbone of the three-way match (BUILD NEW; neither source company had it). At GRN it accrues a liability to the GR/IR clearing account for a PO line (received-not-invoiced); when the matching invoice clears it sets clearedAmount and moves the status to cleared or partially-cleared (invoiced-and-received). It decouples receiving from invoicing and enables received-not-invoiced (GNI) and invoiced-not-received reconciliation at month-end. The two-way path has no GR/IR entry (the payable posts directly).
lifecycleEnum: GrIrStatus (accrued -> partially-cleared -> cleared); reversed on a return for the returned quantity

fields.name: identifier
fields.label: GR/IR Entry Ref.
fields.validation: system pattern; unique; immutable once posted
fields.purpose: Stable key for the clearing entry so the accrual at GRN and the relief at invoice match trace to one record per PO line; the handle for the GNI / invoiced-not-received month-end reconciliation.

fields.name: poLineId
fields.label: PO Line
fields.validation: resolves to a PO line; not null; the grain of the entry is the PO line
fields.purpose: The PO line the clearing entry is accrued and cleared against; per-line grain is what lets the three-way match clear receipt against invoice line by line and reconcile partial deliveries.

fields.name: grnId
fields.label: Goods Receipt
fields.validation: resolves to the GRN that accrued the entry; not null (GR/IR exists only on the GRN/materials path)
fields.purpose: The receipt that posted the accrual; GR/IR is accrued at GRN and the commitment relieved to actual at the same point, so the entry exists only on the GRN/three-way path (the two-way path has none).

fields.name: invoiceId
fields.label: Invoice
fields.mandatoryCondition: null until a matched invoice clears the entry; set on clearing
fields.validation: null while accrued (received-not-invoiced); set to the matched invoice on clear
fields.purpose: Links the clearing entry to the invoice that relieved it; null is the explicit received-not-invoiced (GNI) marker, set is the invoiced-and-received state. The match sets this when it auto-clears (axiom A8).

fields.name: matchResultId
fields.label: Match Result
fields.mandatoryCondition: set when a match relieves the entry
fields.validation: resolves to the cleared MatchResult when set
fields.purpose: Ties the clearing to the reconciliation that triggered it, so a cleared three-way match is the event that relieves this entry; null while still accrued.

fields.name: accruedAmount
fields.label: Accrued Amount
fields.validation: >= 0; = GRN accepted quantity * PO agreed price for the line at GRN
fields.purpose: The liability accrued to the GR/IR clearing account at receipt (received-not-invoiced); the goods-received side of the clearing the matched invoice relieves.

fields.name: clearedAmount
fields.label: Cleared Amount
fields.validation: >= 0; <= accruedAmount; set from the matched invoice line on clearing; pro-rata reversed on a return
fields.computedFormula: set to the matched invoice line amount on clear (cumulative for partial)
fields.purpose: The invoiced-and-received portion relieved from the accrual; equal to the accrued amount fully clears the entry, less than it leaves it partially-cleared with the remainder clearing on the next matched invoice.

fields.name: openAmount
fields.label: Open Amount
fields.purpose: The still-accrued received-not-invoiced balance; the figure the month-end GNI / invoiced-not-received reconciliation reports and that a return reversal reduces for the returned quantity.

fields.name: status
fields.label: Status
fields.validation: accrued on GRN; partially-cleared when 0 < clearedAmount < accruedAmount; cleared when clearedAmount = accruedAmount
fields.purpose: The clearing lifecycle position; an accrued or partially-cleared entry is an open GR/IR liability, a cleared entry is fully reconciled, and the rollup of open entries drives the GNI control report (axiom A8 relief on match).

fields.name: accruedAt
fields.label: Accrued At
fields.purpose: Timestamps the accrual at receipt; dates the GR/IR liability for the aging of received-not-invoiced balances and anchors the audit/SSE entry (axiom A13).

fields.name: clearedAt
fields.label: Cleared At
fields.purpose: Timestamps when the entry was fully relieved by a matched invoice; measures the received-to-invoiced lag for the GNI control and dates the relief event.

invariants: A4 GR/IR accrued and commitment relieved to actual at GRN; cleared at invoice match
A8 a cleared three-way match relieves GR/IR; the two-way path has no GR/IR entry
A12 amounts normalized to base via FX for reconciliation
A13 audit + SSE on accrual and clearing
a partial three-way clear leaves status partially-cleared; the remainder clears on the next matched invoice
a return reverses the GR/IR accrual pro-rata to the returned quantity
